title: Transcript Replay Acceptance Matrix
latest_stable_baseline: M60.6.4 Transcript Replay / Model Benchmark Pilot
attempted_scope: expand transcript replay pilot into multi-runtime acceptance matrix
cover json, ordo-code, and json,ordo-code runtime views

blocker.summary: Python parent-loop can hang while waiting for embedded runtime CLI subprocess completion in transcript replay matrix expansion path.
blocker.manual_rerun_note: Generated sandbox commands such as verify-targets and verify-session completed when re-run manually after the parent timeout, suggesting a process-boundary/parent-loop issue.

experimental_patches_not_released: runtime-safe direction pool excluding back as generated branch label
OS timeout boundary with file-backed stdout/stderr

calibration_decision.reason: No accepted M60.6.5 matrix evidence exists. M60.6.4 remains a pilot, not a calibration run.

impact_classification.future_fix: L1 for PathWalk companion utility process-boundary orchestration; L0 for Ordo runtime core and scoring weights
